data.revised_prompt: cinematic realistic watercolor book illustration, professional visual for a Chinese 30-minute book-summary video, quiet Kamakura and Izu Oshima atmosphere, Japanese seaside town, camellia flowers, paper letters, fountain pens, warm natural film lighting, detailed environment, emotional healing tone, soft but rich colors, storybook realism, consistent art direction across a 24-image sequence, 16:9, no readable text, no logo, no watermark. Main protagonist: one East Asian woman in her early 30s, shoulder-length black hair, soft cream cardigan, calm tired eyes. Mother: East Asian woman in her late 50s with short grey hair and muted green cardigan, clearly older than the protagonist. Daughter: teenage East Asian girl with school uniform and ponytail, clearly much younger. When a scene includes multiple people, make them different ages, different clothes, different hairstyles, different faces. Scene 16/24, story beat: Tea shop conversation. Composition: small tea shop near the sea, the protagonist sits across from an older man with silver hair and navy jacket, teacups between them, they speak gently about an unwritten letter. People rule: two people only, protagonist and clearly older man, different gender and age. Keep this image narratively connected to the nearby subtitle meaning, but do not draw readable words: 变成某一天忽然想起时胸口的温热读这本书也是在读鸠子对女性身份的重新整理她不是只作为母亲而存在也不是只作为代笔人而存在她会爱孩子也会厌倦家务她会珍惜家庭也会怀念独处她能替别人写出细腻的信却也会在自己的生活里语塞她温柔却并不总是从容这样的不完美让她可信很多时候我们也像鸠子一样在别人眼里已经做得很好却在心
